sentences.text: Thank you for calling Columbia residential. If you know, your party's extension you may dial it at any time to dial by name, please dial one. Please spell the name of the person's last name first press seven for cue. Press one for Tiffany press two for extension one six nine to cancel is and we're different please hold while I transfer your call.

conversation.title: Call: Mitch  Scarski  and Yolanda Johnson @ Columbia Residential
